package rulecoverage

func NegativeGormModelContainsCalculatedResponseFields() string {
    ruleID := "gorm_model_contains_calculated_response_fields"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Persistence structs that carry API-only derived presentation fields."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
